title: hedyotis costata
intro: Hedyotis costata, also known as the 'coastal buttonbush', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Hedyotis costata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
